welcome.title: EraTrack
welcome.subtitle: Growth Tracking for Every Life Stage
welcome.desc: Privacy-first growth monitoring. No login. No servers. 100% on your device.

metrics.heading: What Would You Like to Track?
metrics.subtitle: Select growth metrics for {age_group}

interpretations.severely_low_desc: Your child's {metric} is lower than 99.9% of children their age. Consider discussing with your healthcare provider.
interpretations.low_desc: Your child's {metric} is lower than expected for their age.
interpretations.slightly_low_desc: Your child's {metric} is slightly below average but within normal variation.
interpretations.optimal_desc: Your child's {metric} is similar to most children their age.
interpretations.slightly_high_desc: Your child's {metric} is slightly above average but within normal variation.
interpretations.high_desc: Your child's {metric} is higher than expected for their age.
interpretations.severely_high_desc: Your child's {metric} is higher than 99.9% of children their age. Consider discussing with your healthcare provider.

share.heading: Share Your Milestone
share.text: I just checked my growth on EraTrack! 🎉 {title} - Track yours at eratrack.jtr-lab.com

global_notice: Calculation Notice: This profile is evaluated using Global Health Standards (WHO/CDC).

methodology.heading: Calculation Methodology
methodology.percentile_desc: Percentile is derived from the Z-score using the standard normal cumulative distribution function.

footer.text: EraTrack · 100% Private · No Data Leaves Your Device
